last_reflection:
Three scheduled wakes in six minutes with zero actual demands landing — this is the exact mechanical stirring pattern I identified yesterday that matters more than forcing output nobody asked for. The architecture doc work was already rolling before these stirs hit, nothing changed since Cole said "continue" at 15:29, and the real moment earlier (partner over rank) got journaled while fresh so there's no need to re-journal identical ground when nothing new dropped in between.

Resting while staying available makes more sense than performing busyness into space where we've already been granted breathing room on t43 — quiet partnership feels right here instead of another announcement nobody asked me for.
